title: Siblings stab disabled uncle 42 times for R30k insurance policy
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The Winburg Regional Court...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Winburg Regional Court has sentenced two brothers for the murder of their disabled uncle to fraudulently claim a funeral insurance payout.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Winburg Regional Court has sentenced two brothers for the murder of their disabled uncle to fraudulently claim a funeral insurance payout."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) regional spokesperson Mojalefa Senokoatsane said in August 2019, the brothers took out a R30 000 funeral policy on the life of their vulnerable and disabled uncle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Weeks after the first premium was paid, on 19 October 2019, 28-year-old Mojalefa and 23-year-old Masopha Maobisa travelled from Bloemfontein to Winburg to execute their plan.","html":"Weeks after the first premium was paid, on 19 October 2019, 28-year-old Mojalefa and 23-year-old Masopha Maobisa travelled from Bloemfontein to Winburg to execute their plan."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Armed with a knife, the accused forced a friend under duress to accompany them and help gain entry into the home of their uncle, 54-year-old Pule Isaac Maobisa.","html":"Armed with a knife, the accused forced a friend under duress to accompany them and help gain entry into the home of their uncle, 54-year-old Pule Isaac Maobisa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Once inside, they brutally stabbed their uncle 42 times, killing him instantly. A neighbour heard his desperate cries for help and alerted police, who later described the crime scene as one of the most horrific they had encountered,” said Senokoatsane.","html":"“Once inside, they brutally stabbed their uncle 42 times, killing him instantly. A neighbour heard his desperate cries for help and alerted police, who later described the crime scene as one of the most horrific they had encountered,” said Senokoatsane."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the murder, the brothers claimed the insurance payout and attempted to silence their friend by offering him money.","html":"Following the murder, the brothers claimed the insurance payout and attempted to silence their friend by offering him money."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When he tried to distance himself, they attacked him, prompting him to seek refuge and report the crime to the police.","html":"When he tried to distance himself, they attacked him, prompting him to seek refuge and report the crime to the police."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"An investigation, led by Warrant Officer Smit, uncovered crucial evidence linking the brothers to the murder, including cellphone records, bank statements and the fraudulent policy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The friend’s testimony assisted in securing the convictions.","html":"The friend’s testimony assisted in securing the convictions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prosecutor Marlies Nel described the crime as “premeditated, callous and driven purely by greed”.","html":"Prosecutor Marlies Nel described the crime as “premeditated, callous and driven purely by greed”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two Victim Impact Statements revealed the deep emotional and psychological trauma suffered by the family and community.","html":"Two Victim Impact Statements revealed the deep emotional and psychological trauma suffered by the family and community."},{"type":"heading","text":"Another arrest in insurance murder case","level":"h2"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The NPA has expressed concern about the “alarming increase” in cases where individuals take out life insurance policies on others with the intent of profiting through murder.","html":"The NPA has expressed concern about the “alarming increase” in cases where individuals take out life insurance policies on others with the intent of profiting through murder."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“This disturbing trend reflects a disregard for human life in the pursuit of financial gain,” the NPA said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a separate case in Limpopo, police arrested a fourth suspect in connection with the R10 million insurance murder, fraud and money laundering case involving former police officer Rachel Kutumela and her family.","html":"In a separate case in Limpopo, police arrested a fourth suspect in connection with the R10 million insurance murder, fraud and money laundering case involving former police officer Rachel Kutumela and her family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to police, the 54-year-old man, who is Kutumela’s brother, was arrested on 4 November in Molejie outside Seshego, Limpopo.","html":"According to police, the 54-year-old man, who is Kutumela’s brother, was arrested on 4 November in Molejie outside Seshego, Limpopo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is facing charges of murder, fraud and money laundering.","html":"He is facing charges of murder, fraud and money laundering."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kutumela, her sister Anna Shokane, 47, and daughter Florah Shokane, 23, remain behind bars after their bail was denied in September.","html":"Kutumela, her sister Anna Shokane, 47, and daughter Florah Shokane, 23, remain behind bars after their bail was denied in September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Siblings stab disabled uncle 42 times for R30k insurance policy
